description: Controlled designer vocabulary mapped onto structural selector queries.

segmented_motion.description: Directional segmented motion without noisy texture.

wide_clean_motion.description: Wide, clean perimeter or marquee-like motion.

restrained_star_motion.description: Restrained animated directional motion on star geometry.

helical_tree_fill.description: Geometry-coupled clean spiral fill on spiral trees.

round_tree_spiral_rotation.description: Directional steady spiral rotation on round trees.
